freeTool.faqUseTitle: What is this calculator used for?
freeTool.faqUseAnswer: {title} gives a quick formula-based estimate from the values you enter. Use it for sanity checks before quoting, ordering or planning.
freeTool.faqFreeAnswer: Yes. SectorCalc free calculators run in your browser with no sign-up required.
freeTool.faqPremiumAnswer: استخدم حاسبة مميزة عندما يؤثر التقدير على التسعير أو العمليات أو قرارات الإدارة وتحتاج إلى محركات خفية وعتبات وتقارير قابلة للتصدير.

premium.whenToUseBody: استخدم هذه الحاسبة عندما تؤثر النتيجة على التسعير أو العمليات أو السعة أو التخطيط أو تقارير الإدارة.
premium.decidesTitle: ما القرار الذي تساعد هذه الحاسبة فيه
premium.previewExcludesTitle: What the preview does not include
premium.previewExcludesBody: The free preview shows sample structure only. Full threshold checks, hidden driver breakdown, suggested actions and export-ready PDF or CSV require paid access.
premium.faqReportTitle: What is included in the premium decision report?
premium.faqErpTitle: Is this a replacement for ERP or professional advice?
premium.faqMeasureAnswer: {name} measures hidden loss exposure and operating drivers from the inputs you provide, with threshold interpretation against stated bands.
premium.faqReportAnswer: The decision report includes executive summary, hidden driver breakdown, threshold check, suggested actions, assumption notes and export-ready output on paid access.
premium.faqErpAnswer: No. SectorCalc is a calculator and decision-report layer. It does not replace ERP, accounting systems or professional financial, legal or engineering advice.
premium.faqPremiumAnswer: استخدم حاسبة مميزة عندما يؤثر التقدير على التسعير أو العمليات أو قرارات الإدارة وتحتاج إلى محركات خفية وعتبات وتقارير قابلة للتصدير.

guardrail.formula: I can't run calculations or share formulas. Open the relevant tool and it will compute the result for you.
guardrail.privateData: I can't access private data, accounts, or secrets, and I can't bypass any gate.

reply.findTool: Here are tools that match what you described:
reply.explainTool: This tool turns your job inputs into a clear verdict with the risk drivers behind it:
reply.inputs: You enter the core costs, quantities, and rates for your job. Required fields are kept minimal, and optional fields sharpen the result.
reply.results: The result is a verdict with the metrics and risk drivers behind it, so you can see why it lands where it does and what to adjust.
reply.approvedReports: يمكن حفظ نتائج Premium كملخصات قرار قابلة للتصدير لمراجعة الفريق داخليًا.
reply.trustTrace: يسجل ملخص الحساب المدخلات والافتراضات وخطوات التحقق لتوضيح كيفية إنتاج النتيجة.
reply.regionalUnits: SectorCalc supports metric, imperial, and regional units, and shows the conversions it used.
reply.benchmarks: SectorCalc shows indicative regional benchmark context next to your result — for orientation, not official figures.
reply.pricing: You can see the plans and what each includes on the pricing page:
reply.enterprise: For team usage, reporting governance, bundles, and procurement, see the enterprise page:
reply.about: SectorCalc is a global industrial calculation and decision-support platform that exposes hidden losses and turns computation into reliable decisions:
reply.blockedFormula: I can't run calculations or share formulas. Open the relevant tool and it will compute the result for you.
reply.blockedPrivate: I can't access private data, accounts, or secrets, and I can't bypass any gate.
reply.fallback: I can help you find the right tool, understand inputs and results, and navigate SectorCalc. Try one of these:

premiumSeo.metaDescription: How the {tool} works, who it is for, what to enter, and how to read the result. Pricing and margin-risk decision support from SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool}: price the job and protect the margin
premiumSeo.intro: The {tool} helps you pressure-test a job before you commit to a price. It turns your costs, quantities, and rates into a clear margin and risk read, so you can spot the hidden drivers that quietly erode profit and decide with confidence instead of guessing on the bid.
premiumSeo.problem: Most jobs lose margin long before the invoice, when setup, rework, overruns, and underpriced line items are never added up before the quote goes out. The {tool} makes those drivers visible so they stop surprising you.
premiumSeo.help: It applies SectorCalc's deterministic calculation engine to your inputs, then highlights the factors that move the result the most. You get a structured read you can defend, not a black-box number.
premiumSeo.who: Operators, estimators, owners, and managers who price work, review bids, or need a consistent baseline across a team will get the most from the {tool}.
premiumSeo.inputs: You provide the core costs, quantities, rates, and assumptions specific to your job. Required fields are kept minimal, and optional fields sharpen the result when you have the data.
premiumSeo.outputs: The {tool} returns a clear verdict with the metrics and risk drivers behind it, so you can see not just the number but why it lands where it does and what to adjust.
premiumSeo.trust: يمكن أن تتضمن نتائج Premium ملخص حساب محفوظًا كملخص قرار قابل للتصدير.

faq.a: يمكنك معاينة النهج مجانًا؛ الحكم الكامل والمقاييس وملخص القرار المتميز مشمول في SectorCalc Pro.
No. It is a technical simulation and decision-support tool, not financial, legal, or engineering advice. Verify results before business decisions.
Results reflect the inputs you provide and SectorCalc's deterministic engine. Better inputs produce a sharper, more defensible read.
نعم. يمكن تصدير نتائج Premium كملخصات قرار مع ملخص الحساب.
It is tuned for its sector's pricing and margin patterns, and it sits alongside the rest of SectorCalc's 27-sector toolset.

homeAbout.title: About Us
homeAbout.paragraph1: Profit often leaks from businesses through unnoticed costs, not sales. Incorrect pricing, calculation errors, waste, efficiency loss, and weak quoting discipline silently erode margins over time.
homeAbout.paragraph2: SectorCalc is engineered to make these invisible losses quantifiable. It elevates cost, proposal, efficiency, and risk decisions onto a faster, more transparent, and reliable baseline.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: Precision in calculation is the foundation of reliable performance.
homeAbout.highlightPrimary: A platform to expose hidden losses,
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: and transform computation into reliable decision support.

aboutPage.seoTitle: About SectorCalc | Industrial Calculation & Decision Support
aboutPage.seoDescription: SectorCalc helps businesses expose hidden losses, quantify operational risks, and turn industrial calculations into reliable decision support.

hero.title: Computation, turned into reliable decisions.
hero.lead: SectorCalc is a global industrial calculation and decision support platform that helps businesses expose hidden losses and act on them with confidence.

why.title: Why SectorCalc exists
why.body: Most operational losses never appear on an invoice. They hide in pricing, scrap, setup time, efficiency drops, and weak quoting discipline, and they erode margins quietly for years.

what.title: What SectorCalc is
what.body: A focused suite of sector calculators and decision reports that turn raw operational inputs into clear, defensible numbers, not another spreadsheet or a heavyweight ERP.

problem.title: The problem we solve
problem.body: Teams make cost, quote, and risk decisions on incomplete information. SectorCalc makes the invisible measurable, so decisions rest on evidence instead of guesswork.

how.title: How our system works
how.body: You provide the inputs you know; the system resolves what is required, runs governed deterministic calculations, and validates every result against invariants and benchmarks before showing it.

different.title: What makes us different
different.body: كل نتيجة تحمل ملخص حساب شفافًا ومعايير إقليمية استرشادية وافتراضات موثقة يمكن لفريقك مراجعتها قبل اتخاذ القرار.

who.title: Who it is built for
who.body: Owner-operators, estimators, field teams, and consultants who need fast, reliable answers without hiring a full pricing desk or deploying enterprise software.

building.title: What we are building
building.body: A global standard for sector-specific calculation intelligence, expanding across industries while keeping every formula governed, auditable, and trustworthy.

manifesto.primary: A platform to expose hidden losses,
manifesto.secondary: and transform computation into reliable decision support.

mission.text: كثير من الشركات تدير العروض والهدر والعمالة والطاقة والنقل والهامش في ملفات منفصلة أو بالتقدير. يهدف SectorCalc إلى جعل هذه الحسابات أوضح وقابلة للمقارنة والتكرار.

reports.body: Run a free sector check, then unlock a Single Verdict or SectorCalc Pro to save reports.
reports.bodyWithCredits: Run your unlocked premium calculator and save the verdict report here.

purchases.title: Single verdict credits
purchases.body: One-time purchases unlock the premium calculator for that sector tool.

login.title: Sign in to view saved reports
login.body: Saved verdict reports are linked to your SectorCalc account.

meta.title: Beta Partner Program
meta.description: Apply to help SectorCalc build verified sector benchmarks with structured operational feedback.

hero.title: Help build verified sector benchmarks
hero.subtitle: Share structured operational data in exchange for premium reports and early access to benchmark-backed calculators.

who.title: Who should apply
who.item1: Operators tracking scrap, setup, route, energy or margin loss
who.item3: فرق صغيرة تحتاج إلى حسابات واضحة قبل اعتماد برامج معقدة
who.item4: Teams willing to give structured feedback on calculator fit

data.title: What data we collect
data.item1: Industry, company size and main loss area
data.item2: Current tracking method and estimated monthly loss range
data.item3: Optional anonymized benchmark permission after review

benefits.title: What you get
benefits.item1: Early access to premium decision reports
benefits.item2: Direct input into sector benchmark design
benefits.item3: Optional case study participation with explicit permission

form.heading: Apply for beta partner access
form.intro: All fields marked * are required. We review applications manually — no fake claims or auto-published case studies.
form.caseStudyPermission: I may allow anonymized or named case study use after review
form.successBody: Thank you. We review beta partner applications manually and will follow up by email.

feedback.prompt: Optional: help improve this report with structured feedback.
feedback.title: How well did this report fit your operation?
feedback.benchmarkPermission: Allow anonymized use in future sector benchmarks (reviewed by admin)
feedback.thankYou: Thank you — feedback saved for benchmark review.

premiumDecisionReport.hiddenDriversIntro: These secondary outputs explain what is pushing the main result up or down.

locked.title: Unlock the full decision report
locked.text: The preview shows the headline exposure. The full report shows the hidden drivers, threshold interpretation, suggested actions and export-ready output.
locked.valueLine: Best when the result affects pricing, operations or management decisions.
locked.exportLocked: Export is included with the full decision report.
locked.samplePrintNote: Sample preview — unlock the full report to print without the sample label.

decisionValue.title: Decision value
decisionValue.intro: What this report helps you decide
decisionValue.bullet2: Compare against warning and critical thresholds
decisionValue.bullet3: Turn the result into a practical action
decisionValue.bullet4: Export the report for management or client review

homepage.headline: Measure hidden loss across your sector

calculator.awaiting: Enter values to see your result

legal.disclaimer: This result is a technical estimate based on your inputs. It does not replace financial, legal, medical or engineering advice.
legal.premiumDisclaimer: This report is a decision-support simulation. It does not replace financial, legal, medical or engineering advice.
legal.reportNote: For operational reference only — verify assumptions before committing to pricing or contracts.

errors.calculationFailed: We could not calculate this result. Check the inputs and try again.
errors.invalidInput: One or more values are invalid. Please review the highlighted fields.
errors.networkError: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
errors.accessDenied: You need premium access for this report.
errors.notFound: This page or tool could not be found.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

seo.homeTitle: SectorCalc — Sector calculators and decision reports
seo.homeDescription: Measure hidden loss, margin exposure and operational risk with sector-specific calculators — without ERP complexity.
seo.freeToolsDescription: Free browser calculators for cost, measurement, energy and business decisions. No sign-up required.
seo.pricingDescription: Free calculators and premium decision reports — single reports from $9, Pro from $19/month.
seo.premiumToolsDescription: Hidden-loss diagnostics, threshold checks and export-ready decision reports for operational teams.

homepageStrip.title: Start with a sector guide
homepageStrip.lead: Pick a campaign landing page for manufacturing, construction, logistics or energy.

industryPage.freeCalculatorNote: Quick check only — no minimum safe price or accept/reject verdict.
industryPage.relatedNote: Hidden-loss diagnostics with threshold checks, suggested actions and export-ready reports.
industryPage.additionalNote: Related decision tools on the SectorCalc roadmap for this sector.

premiumAccess.publicPreviewTitle: Try this calculator before you subscribe
premiumAccess.publicPreviewDescription: Enter your job inputs, validate the form and run a preview calculation. Export, saved reports and ملخص الحساب require SectorCalc Pro.
premiumAccess.signedInPreviewTitle: Preview mode — Pro unlocks full reports
premiumAccess.signedInPreviewDescription: You can run the calculator and review the preview verdict. PDF export, saved history and ملخص الحساب require an active Pro plan or single-report purchase.
premiumAccess.lockedExport: PDF and spreadsheet export are available on Pro plans.
premiumAccess.lockedReportHistory: Saved report history requires a signed-in Pro account.
premiumAccess.fullReportRequiresPro: Full exportable report requires SectorCalc Pro.
premiumAccess.panelDescription: Sign in with Google to access premium calculators or continue checkout. Admin sign-in is separate above.

signInErrors.unauthorized-domain: This domain is not authorized for Google sign-in. Use sectorcalc.com or add the domain in Firebase Console → Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains.
signInErrors.popup-blocked: Popup was blocked. Redirect sign-in was attempted — allow popups or try again.
signInErrors.network: Network error during sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
signInErrors.not-configured: Sign-in is unavailable because Firebase Auth is not configured in this environment.
signInErrors.generic: Sign-in failed. Try again or use a different browser.

validation.missingInputs: {count, plural, one {# required field is missing} other {# required fields are missing}}
validation.invalidCombination: These inputs cannot produce a valid calculation.

notices.requiredInputReason: Each field maps to a verified contract input for this calculator.
notices.calculationBlocked: Complete required fields before running the calculation.
notices.validatedInputSet: Input set ready — run calculation when values are confirmed.

compatibility.missingContractField: This calculator is missing a required contract input in Smart Form.
compatibility.hiddenRequiredSimple: Switch to Advanced mode to enter all required contract fields.
compatibility.missingRequired: Complete all required fields before running the calculation.
compatibility.invalidInput: Fix invalid inputs before running the calculation.

feedback.title: Feedback & formula objection
feedback.subtitle: Tell us if this formula does not match your field reality.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Describe what does not match your operation or sector practice.

success.title: Feedback recorded
success.description: Thank you. Your feedback helps strengthen verified calculations.

error.validation: Please check the form and try again.
error.submitFailed: Could not submit feedback. Please try again shortly.
error.tooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.

admin.title: Tool feedback queue
admin.subtitle: Review formula objections, wrong results, and improvement requests.
admin.signInRequired: Sign in to open the feedback queue.
admin.adminOnly: Sign in with an admin account to view the feedback queue.
admin.firebaseMissing: Firebase is not configured — no live records will load.
admin.selectItem: Select an item to view details.

feedback.visibilityNote: Surface hidden loss and record what the field actually shows.
feedback.trustTraceNote: Formula objections help improve verified calculations.
feedback.formulaObjectionNote: Tell us if this formula does not match your field reality.

regionalUnits.title: Unit & measurement converter
regionalUnits.subtitle: Convert between metric, imperial and regional units. Display only — your calculation results are unchanged.
regionalUnits.notConvertible: These units cannot be converted directly.
regionalUnits.canonicalNote: Values normalize to a canonical unit before any comparison.

regionalBenchmarks.title: Indicative benchmark ranges
regionalBenchmarks.subtitle: Reference bands for decision support. Indicative only — not official statistics or financial advice.
regionalBenchmarks.disclaimer: Benchmarks are indicative decision-support ranges, not official statistics or financial advice. Verify against your own data before any business decision.

caseStudies.title: Representative case studies
caseStudies.subtitle: Synthetic scenarios showing problem framing, tool inputs and loss types — labeled representative, never verified client savings.
caseStudies.representativeNote: Representative scenario — modeled exposure, not a verified customer outcome.

fieldMode.title: Field mode & offline
fieldMode.subtitle: Install for on-site use. Offline shows a cached shell only — live calculations and verified reports need a connection.
fieldMode.staleDataWarning: Saved data may be out of date — verify before using it for decisions.
fieldMode.privacyNote: Stored only on this device. No secrets or sensitive personal data.

freeToolUi.exportNote: يستخدم تصدير PDF اشتراكك الحالي وخط إنتاج التقارير.
freeToolUi.contractFormDecisionGoal: ما النتيجة التي تنتجها هذه المدخلات وفق الصيغة الموثقة؟
freeToolUi.optionalInputsDescription: تحسّن دقة التقدير دون كسر القيم الافتراضية.
freeToolUi.contractNotFound: لم يُعثر على عقد النموذج الذكي لهذه الأداة.
freeToolUi.calculationStepsEmpty: ستظهر خطوات الحساب عندما يعرض هذا العقد أثرًا حتميًا.

compressor-energy-cost-calculator.description: احسب تكلفة التشغيل من kilowatt الضاغط والساعات والتعرفة.

cbam-exposure-quick-check.title: فحص سريع لتعرض CBAM
cbam-exposure-quick-check.description: احسب التعرض لتكلفة الكربون على الحدود من الانبعاثات وسعر الكربون.

fuel-consumption-calculator.title: حاسبة استهلاك الوقود
fuel-consumption-calculator.description: احسب لترات الوقود وتكلفة الرحلة من المسافة والاقتصاد.

fuel-cost-calculator.title: حاسبة تكلفة الوقود
fuel-cost-calculator.description: احسب لترات الوقود والتكلفة الإجمالية من المسافة والاقتصاد.

desi-calculator.title: حاسبة ديسي
desi-calculator.description: احسب الوزن الحجمي (desi) من أبعاد الطرد.

volumetric-weight-calculator.title: حاسبة الوزن الحجمي
volumetric-weight-calculator.description: احسب الوزن الحجمي القابل للفوترة للشحن.

route-cost-calculator.title: حاسبة تكلفة المسار
route-cost-calculator.description: احسب تكلفة الرحلة من الوقود ووقت السائق والرسوم.

delivery-cost-calculator.title: حاسبة تكلفة التسليم
delivery-cost-calculator.description: احسب تكلفة الميل الأخير من المسافة ورسوم التوقف.

freight-cost-calculator.title: حاسبة تكلفة الشحن
freight-cost-calculator.description: احسب رسوم الشحن من تعرفة الوزن والرسوم الثابتة.

warehouse-storage-cost-calculator.title: حاسبة تكلفة تخزين المستودع
warehouse-storage-cost-calculator.description: احسب تكلفة التخزين من عدد المنصات والتعرفة اليومية والأيام.

vehicle-depreciation-calculator.title: حاسبة إهلاك المركبة
vehicle-depreciation-calculator.description: احسب الإهلاك السنوي للمركبة بالطريقة الخطية.

trip-budget-calculator.title: حاسبة ميزانية الرحلة
trip-budget-calculator.description: احسب الميزانية الإجمالية من الوقود والإقامة والطعام والمصاريف الإضافية.

fertilizer-dosage-calculator.title: حاسبة جرعة السماد
fertilizer-dosage-calculator.description: احسب إجمالي السماد من مساحة الحقل ومعدل الجرعة.

seed-rate-calculator.title: حاسبة معدل البذور
seed-rate-calculator.description: احسب كمية البذور من المساحة ومعدل البذر.

irrigation-cost-check.title: فحص تكلفة الري
irrigation-cost-check.description: احسب طاقة المضخة وتكلفة الماء للري.

water-usage-calculator.title: حاسبة استخدام الماء
water-usage-calculator.description: احسب اللترات من معدل التدفق والمدة.

feed-cost-estimator.title: مقدّر تكلفة العلف
feed-cost-estimator.description: احسب إجمالي تكلفة العلف شاملة النقل.

milk-yield-check.title: فحص إنتاج الحليب
milk-yield-check.description: احسب لترات الحليب اليومية وتقدير الإيرادات.

crop-yield-calculator.title: حاسبة إنتاجية المحصول
crop-yield-calculator.description: احسب طن الحصاد والإيرادات من الإنتاجية لكل hectare.

recipe-cost-check.title: فحص تكلفة الوصفة
recipe-cost-check.description: احسب تكلفة الحصة من إجمالي إنفاق المكونات.

food-cost-calculator.title: حاسبة نسبة تكلفة الطعام
food-cost-calculator.description: احسب نسبة تكلفة الطعام من تكلفة المكونات وسعر القائمة.

portion-cost-calculator.title: حاسبة تكلفة الحصة
portion-cost-calculator.description: احسب التكلفة لكل حصة من تكلفة الدفعة.

rent-vs-buy-calculator.title: حاسبة الإيجار مقابل الشراء
rent-vs-buy-calculator.description: قارن الإيجار مع الدفعة المستثمرة مقابل الشراء برهن عقاري وتقدير القيمة.

home-budget-calculator.title: حاسبة ميزانية المنزل
home-budget-calculator.description: قارن المصاريف الشهرية بالدخل واحسب الرصيد المتبقي.

age-calculator.title: حاسبة العمر
age-calculator.description: احسب العمر بالسنوات من سنة الميلاد.

date-difference-calculator.title: حاسبة فرق التاريخ
date-difference-calculator.description: احسب فرق الأيام بين رقمي يوم.

shopping-budget-calculator.title: حاسبة ميزانية التسوق
shopping-budget-calculator.description: احسب مجموع ما يصل إلى خمس بنود تسوق.

fuel-travel-calculator.title: حاسبة وقود السفر
fuel-travel-calculator.description: احسب وقود الرحلة وتكلفتها للسفر الشخصي.

unit-price-calculator.title: حاسبة السعر للوحدة
unit-price-calculator.description: احسب السعر لكل وحدة من السعر الإجمالي والكمية.

tip-calculator.title: حاسبة الإكرامية
tip-calculator.description: احسب مبلغ الإكرامية والفاتورة الإجمالية بنسبة الإكرامية.

savings-goal-calculator.title: حاسبة هدف الادخار
savings-goal-calculator.description: احسب الأشهر اللازمة للوصول إلى هدف ادخار.

percentage-increase-calculator.title: حاسبة الزيادة النسبية
percentage-increase-calculator.description: احسب نسبة التغير من القيمة القديمة إلى الجديدة.

average-calculator.title: حاسبة المتوسط
average-calculator.description: احسب المتوسط الحسابي لما يصل إلى خمس قيم.

median-calculator.title: حاسبة الوسيط
median-calculator.description: احسب الوسيط لما يصل إلى خمس قيم رقمية.

standard-deviation-calculator.title: حاسبة الانحراف المعياري
standard-deviation-calculator.description: احسب الانحراف المعياري للمجتمع لما يصل إلى خمس قيم.

proportion-calculator.title: حاسبة التناسب
proportion-calculator.description: احسب x في التناسب a/b = c/x.

probability-calculator.title: حاسبة الاحتمال
probability-calculator.description: احسب نسبة الاحتمال من النتائج المواتية والإجمالية.

sample-size-calculator.title: حاسبة حجم العينة
sample-size-calculator.description: احسب حجم العينة للمجتمع المحدود من هامش الخطأ ومستوى الثقة.

z-score-calculator.title: حاسبة الدرجة Z
z-score-calculator.description: احسب الدرجة المعيارية من القيمة والمتوسط والانحراف المعياري.

linear-regression-calculator.title: حاسبة الانحدار الخطي
linear-regression-calculator.description: احسب خط المربعات الصغرى عبر ثلاث نقاط (x,y).

length-converter.title: محول الطول
length-converter.description: حوّل الأطوال بين mm وcm وm وkm والبوصة والقدم والياردة والميل.

weight-converter.title: محول الوزن
weight-converter.description: حوّل الكتلة بين g وkg وطن وأونصة ورطل.

area-converter.title: محول المساحة
area-converter.description: حوّل وحدات المساحة بما فيها m² وft² وacres والهectares.

volume-converter.title: محول الحجم
volume-converter.description: حوّل الحجم بين ml وL وm³ وin³ وft³ والجallon الأمريكي.

premiumSchemaPage.bullet3: PDF وCSV جاهزان للتصدير في الخطط المدفوعة
premiumSchemaPage.legalQuestion: هل هذه نصيحة مالية أو هندسية؟
premiumSchemaPage.legalAnswer: لا. حاسبات SectorCalc المميزة أدوات دعم قرار بافتراضات شفافة. لا تحل محل المشورة المالية أو القانونية أو الهندسية المهنية.
